channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Barnaby Joyce downplays candidate’s immigration comments ahead of Farrer byelection
item.description: Barnaby Joyce has attributed a recent slip-up by One Nation’s Farrer candidate, David Farley, on immigration policy to the pressures of campaigning. Farley, during a forum hosted by Barrie Cassidy, su...

item.title: House Lawmaker Edgar Erice Opts Out of VP Sara Duterte Impeachment Vote
item.description: House Senior Deputy Minority Leader Representative Edgar Erice announced that he will abstain from participating in the House of Representatives vote regarding the impeachment complaint filed against ...

item.title: Kisumu Mother Struggles After Politician Fails to Deliver Promised Assistance
item.description: In Kisumu, Lilian Awuor, a single mother living with Sickle Cell Disease, is struggling to rebuild her life after a politician she trusted failed to honour promises made to her. Earlier this year, Awu...

item.title: The Unregulated World of Health Supplements: Are They Necessary?
item.description: Health supplements have become a booming industry, offering everything from vitamins to weight loss aids. However, with minimal regulation, it's difficult to determine which supplements are beneficial...

item.title: Queensland Premier responds to ministers’ undeclared affair and conflict of interest concerns
item.description: Queensland Premier David Crisafulli is facing scrutiny after it emerged that two of his ministers, Sport Minister Tim Mander and Child Safety Minister Amanda Camm, were involved in an extramarital rel...

item.title: Ruth Odinga Appeals for Unity in ODM Party, Urges Leaders and Church to Intervene
item.description: Kisumu Woman Representative Ruth Odinga has strongly called on the church and senior ODM leaders to step in and resolve the escalating divisions within the Orange Democratic Movement party. Speaking a...

item.title: Federal Budget to Determine Future Fuel Excise Relief as Oil Prices Surge
item.description: The temporary halving of the fuel excise, introduced at the start of April, has cut petrol and diesel prices by 26.3 cents per litre in response to soaring oil prices amid international tensions. Assi...

item.title: Assam Assembly Election 2026: Counting Schedule and Key Updates
item.description: The Assam assembly elections concluded on April 9, 2026, with a notably high voter turnout of over 85%, reflecting active public participation. The Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP), led by Chief Minister ...

item.title: Eldoret Family Appeals for Information on Missing Father Last Seen in Mombasa
item.description: For almost ten years now, the Chebii family from Eldoret has been living with the uncertainty of their father, David Kipkorir Chebii, who disappeared in Mombasa back in 2016. David, a truck driver, wa...

item.title: Oburu Oginga Calls for Unity Among ODM Leaders Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: Nairobi – ODM leader Oburu Oginga has called on senior party leaders to prioritise unity amid growing divisions within the Orange Democratic Movement as the 2027 General Election approaches. Speaking ...

item.title: Ricky Stuart's Training Challenge Transforms Simi Sasagi into Key Raiders Player
item.description: Simi Sasagi, a talented and versatile NRL player for the Canberra Raiders, has seen a significant boost in his performance thanks to a challenge set by coach Ricky Stuart. Initially hesitant about com...

item.title: Squadron Energy and Windlab seek funding for Queensland’s 1.4GW Bungaban wind project
item.description: Two years after Squadron Energy and Windlab secured Rio Tinto as a long-term partner for the Bungaban project, the 1.4-gigawatt wind farm in Queensland is preparing to enter the construction phase. Re...

item.title: MSU-Maguindanao Offers First Diploma in Women, Peace and Security in Asia
item.description: Peace advocates are calling for the replication of the Diploma in Women, Peace and Security (DWPS) postgraduate program of Mindanao State University-Maguindanao in other state universities in Region 1...

item.title: Former broadcaster Jay Sonza granted bail due to warrant error
item.description: The Philippine court has allowed former broadcaster Jay Sonza to post bail following an initial error in the issuance of his warrant. Sonza's lawyer, Atty. Mark Tolentino, confirmed that the correctio...

item.title: Himachal Pradesh 12th Board Results Expected on May 4, 2026: How to Access Them
item.description: The Himachal Pradesh Board of School Education is expected to announce the results of the 12th standard examinations on 4th May 2026 at 11 am. Students eagerly awaiting their results can check them on...

item.title: Addressing Rare Diseases in the Philippines: Policy Updates and Patient Stories
item.description: Living with a rare disease in the Philippines is often a long and challenging journey. Rare conditions, which affect a very small number of people, are often genetic, complex, and difficult to diagnos...

item.title: Durban City goalkeeper Darren Keet announces retirement after Nedbank Cup victory
item.description: Durban City goalkeeper Darren Keet has confirmed that he will retire from professional football at the end of the current season. The 36-year-old veteran made the announcement after playing a key role...

item.title: Top Cash-Back Credit Cards for Everyday Spending
item.description: CNN Underscored highlights some of the best cash-back credit cards available in 2026, focusing on simplicity, rewards potential, and the types of shoppers who can benefit most. Cash-back cards are pop...

item.title: Senator Ishaku Abbo Leaves ADC and Joins Labour Party Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: Senator Ishaku Abbo, wey be former federal lawmaker for Adamawa North Senatorial District, don officially waka comot from African Democratic Congress (ADC) join Labour Party along with him supporters ...

item.title: NCERT introduces free online courses for Class 11 and 12 students on the SWAYAM platform
